testcase.name: testEmptyFormValidation

failure.message: Validation errors should appear for empty form submission expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Validation errors should appear for empty form submission expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at
